name: jkpark-claude-plugin
description: Personal Claude Code plugin. Skills: idea-refiner (iterative Korean Q&A that turns a vague idea into a buildable spec), tech-blog-writer (research a topic/article and publish an image-rich, junior-friendly Korean tech blog post as HTML), obs (save content into an Obsidian vault as a tagged folder-note and update the index), obs-recall (search that vault as a personal knowledge base, including attached HTML), obs-html (interview the user on length and requirements, then write an image-rich Korean HTML document and file it into the vault via obs), analyze-image (look at an image the user wants analyzed without making them mention the clipboard — checks the macOS clipboard first by default), and skill-generator (interview-driven creation and auditing of Claude Code skills — generates English SKILL.md files with progressive-disclosure structure, verifies them against pre-launch and trigger-matching checklists, and registers plugin-destined skills in plugin.json). Agent: korean-reviewer (proofreads generated Korean documents for unnatural phrasing). Hook: auto-suggests korean-reviewer after .md/.html/.pptx docs are written. The obs* skills read the vault path from $OBSIDIAN_VAULT, defaulting to ~/workspace/obsidian/MyObsidian. Also ships an opt-in animated emoji status line (statusline/) that shows working 🤖🧠 vs idle 😴💤 — copy in and configure your own settings.json.
